name: Zilla T8 Reptile Strip Desert Light Fixture
description: Provide enough lighting for your reptile buddy with the Zilla T8 Reptile Strip Desert Light Fixture. It features a compact and lightweight design and simulates natural daylight for your companion. It produces 50 microwatts of UVB to promote proper calcium absorption and bone growth. This light also has an energy-efficient electronic ballast for instant-on with a no flicker start. Fulfill the photo-biological requirement of desert reptiles with the Zilla T8 Reptile Strip Desert Light Fixture.
